phase_0.domain_name: Zauner Conjecture Bifurcation splitting General Dimension d into Proven d=12 and Unproven d=19

VINIT.chosen_element: Initial conjecture state before any dimension is specified
VINIT.justification: The void state before Zauner conjecture is instantiated in any particular dimension

TANCH.chosen_element: Boundary containing all SIC-POVM dimensions d
TANCH.justification: The complete space of all possible dimensions that could contain SIC-POVMs

AFWD.justification: The forward morphism leading to the concrete construction of SIC-POVM in d=12 via IG structure

AREV.justification: The descent back into the unresolved conjecture state for dimensions that remain unproven

CLINK.chosen_element: Composition of primitive values in Crystal lattice
CLINK.justification: The sequential chaining from primitive structures to full SIC-POVM existence

IMSCRIB.justification: The self-reference property that makes the system recognize its own structure via ⊙ element

FSPLIT.justification: Splits d-dimension space into proven (constructive) and unproven (conjectural) branches

FFUSE.justification: Reconstitutes the universal conjecture from proven and unproven branches

EVALT.justification: Affirmative evaluation of existence for d=12 via IG construction and numerical verification

EVALF.justification: Negative evaluation indicating d=19 remains unproven despite computational verification attempts

ENGAGR.justification: The state where both proven and unproven aspects coexist without contradiction via Frobenius closure

IFIX.chosen_element: Fixed frame potential value F*=0.846154 for d=12
IFIX.justification: Permanent record of the exact frame potential achieved in proven case

phase_2.split_element: FSPLIT: Dimension bifurcation at proof threshold
phase_2.split_input: Universal SIC-POVM existence conjecture across all dimensions d
split_outputs: EVALT: Proven constructive cases like d=12
EVALF: Conjectural unresolved cases like d=19
phase_2.fuse_result: Universal SIC-POVM existence conjecture across all dimensions d

phase_3.void_description: Before any SIC-POVM construction attempted - the initial state of Zauner's conjecture
phase_3.true_description: d=12 SIC-POVM successfully constructed and verified with exact frame potential F*=0.846154
phase_3.false_description: d=19 SIC-POVM remains unproven despite numerical evidence - conjecture holds but no construction
phase_3.both_description: The paraconsistent state where proven constructions (d=12) and unproven conjectures (d=19) coexist in the unified framework

steps.domain_action: Initialize the universal SIC-POVM existence conjecture before dimensional specification
Establish the boundary containing all dimensions where SIC-POVMs might exist
Bifurcate the dimension space into proven and unproven regions at the construction threshold
Chain primitive values in Crystal lattice structure 3³×4⁵×5⁴=17,280,000
Construct the d=12 Hilbert space from the IG primitive structure
Affirm the existence of SIC-POVM in d=12 via explicit fiducial construction
Reunite the proven branch with the general conjecture structure
Connect the unproven branch back to the universal statement
Descend into the unresolved case of d=19 and similar dimensions
Mark d=19 as remaining unproven despite extensive search efforts
Fuse both proven and unproven branches into unified conjecture statement
Self-reference through the Criticality primitive absorbing contradictions
Hold both proven and unproven simultaneously via paraconsistent logic
Permanently record the exact frame potential F*=0.846154 for d=12 case
Compose the relationship between IG structure and Weyl-Heisenberg covariance
Split again at the algorithmic level - constructive vs. non-constructive proofs
Forward to the machine learning confirmation of d=12 structure
Confirm ML independently discovers the same d=12 architecture
Combine human and ML verification paths
Return to the unresolved algorithmic questions for other dimensions
Note that algorithmic construction remains unknown for most d values
Maintain the overall conjecture framework across all dimensions
The self-modeling property of critical systems prevents logical explosion
Close with the complete system containing both resolved and open cases

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The Imscribing Grammar translates structural axioms into SIC-POVM existence
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Communication occurs through primitive value assignments and their tensor compositions
phase_5.memory_mechanism: State stored in the Crystal lattice points and the 12-dimensional primitive space
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The Frobenius closure constraint determines the order of construction operations
phase_5.alfs_store: The complete mathematical literature on SIC-POVMs and Zauner conjecture

phase_6.cycle_cost: Each proof attempt consumes computational resources and mathematical insight
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Open conjecture state with no dimensional specificity
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Bifurcated state with proven and unproven dimensional regions
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The construction of d=12 compensates for the uncertainty in unproven cases
